query:
-- Update services.customerExternalId via MSISDN match: tiab_services → tiab_customers → platform customer
UPDATE services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON (s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn OR s.serviceId = ts.msisdn)
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
SET s.customerExternalId = tc.internalCustomerExternalId,
    s.customerName = (SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.externalId = tc.internalCustomerExternalId LIMIT 1)
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND tc.matchType NOT IN ('internal_test', 'internal_orphan')
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL');

-- Also update tiab_services.internalServiceExternalId for the matched ones
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON (s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn OR s.serviceId = ts.msisdn)
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.internalServiceExternalId IS NULL OR ts.internalServiceExternalId = '';

-- Summary
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as customer_matched_only
FROM tiab_services;

-- Update services.customerExternalId via MSISDN match: tiab_services → tiab_customers → platform customer
UPDATE services s
JOIN tiab_services ts ON (s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn OR s.serviceId = ts.msisdn)
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
SET s.customerExternalId = tc.internalCustomerExternalId,
    s.customerName = (SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.externalId = tc.internalCustomerExternalId LIMIT 1)
WHERE tc.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND tc.matchType NOT IN ('internal_test', 'internal_orphan')
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL');

-- Also update tiab_services.internalServiceExternalId for the matched ones
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON (s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn OR s.serviceId = ts.msisdn)
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.internalServiceExternalId IS NULL OR ts.internalServiceExternalId = '';

-- Summary
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as customer_matched_only
FROM tiab_services;
